header.description: You imbue the item with an energy that inspires your allies. You cannot use spellshapes when casting spells from this item.

labels.text: This item can hold a maximum of one charge, which it regains at daily preparations.
This item can hold a maximum of two charges, which it regains at daily preparations.
This item can hold a maximum of three charges, which it regains at daily preparations.

This item can hold a maximum of five charges, which it regains at daily preparations. Once per day, as a free action, you can roll a DC 5 Flat Check. On a success, this item regains up to three of its charges, five on a critical success. On a failure, the imbuement loses its potency, immediately dropping this Imbued Property to level 17.
You can expend one charge to cast one of the following spells
